params.collAmount: amount of collateral tokens to distribute

acceptAdmin().notice: Step 2 of the two-step admin transfer: the previously proposed         admin claims ownership. Reverts unless the caller matches         `pendingAdmin`. Clears `pendingAdmin` on success.

claimCollateral(bytes32).notice: Claim earned collateral for a single ilk without withdrawing gUSD.

collateralDust(bytes32).notice: ilk -> pending undistributed collateral (dust from rounding)

cumulativeGainPerGUSD(bytes32).notice: ilk -> cumulative collateral gain per unit of gUSD deposited (scaled by PRECISION)

deposit(uint256).notice: Deposit gUSD into the stability pool.         Pending collateral gains for all registered ilks are settled first.

depositEpoch(address).notice: depositor -> drainEpoch at the time of their last deposit/settle.         If depositEpoch[user] < drainEpoch, the user's gUSD was burned and their         nominal balance is zeroed on next _settleGains call.

depositScaleSnapshot(address).notice: depositor -> scaleIndex at time of last deposit/settle (PRECISION-scaled)

deposits(address).notice: depositor -> gUSD amount at their last deposit/settle (nominal, pre-scale)

drainEpoch().notice: Incremented each time the pool is fully drained (remaining == 0 after offset).         Deposits from a previous epoch are treated as zero on next _settleGains call.         This prevents pre-drain depositors from reclaiming burned gUSD from new depositors.         GOO-361 fix.

epochBoundaryScaleIndex(uint256).notice: epoch -> scaleIndex value recorded just before the drain reset.         When drainEpoch increments, the scaleIndex is first saved here so that         pre-drain depositors can be settled against the correct (pre-reset) scale         rather than the post-reset PRECISION value (GOO-371 fix).

gainSnapshots(address,bytes32).notice: depositor -> ilk -> snapshot of cumulativeGainPerGUSD at deposit time

offset(uint256,bytes32,uint256).notice: Absorb `debtAmount` of bad debt by burning pool gUSD, and         distribute `collAmount` of collateral to depositors pro-rata.

pendingAdmin().notice: Pending admin for the two-step ownership transfer (GOO-493).         A typo in `transferAdmin` cannot brick the contract because the         new admin must explicitly call `acceptAdmin` to take ownership.

pendingGain(address,bytes32).notice: Preview pending collateral gain for a depositor on a given ilk.

provideToSP(uint256).notice: Liquity V1/V2 compatibility alias for deposit().         Ignores the optional frontEndTag parameter (not used in GoodStable).

provideToSP(uint256,address[]).notice: Liquity variant with address[] hints (hints ignored).

registeredIlks(uint256).notice: All registered ilk keys in order of registration.         Used to iterate and reset gainSnapshots on epoch boundary re-deposits (GOO-367).

scaleIndex().notice: Global scale index: product of (remaining/before) fractions after each offset.         Starts at PRECISION (= 1.0). Used to lazily pro-rate deposit balances after         partial offsets without iterating all depositors. GOO-352 fix.

transferAdmin(address).notice: Step 1 of a two-step admin transfer.         The current admin proposes a new admin; ownership is NOT         transferred until the new admin calls `acceptAdmin`.         Pass the current admin's address (or any other) to overwrite a         previous proposal — there is no separate cancel function.         GOO-493.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraw up to `amount` gUSD and claim all pending collateral gains.

documentation.text: @notice Total gUSD in pool
@notice depositor -> gUSD amount at their last deposit/settle (nominal, pre-scale)
@notice depositor -> ilk -> snapshot of cumulativeGainPerGUSD at deposit time
@notice depositor -> scaleIndex at time of last deposit/settle (PRECISION-scaled)

@notice Incremented each time the pool is fully drained (remaining == 0 after offset).
         Deposits from a previous epoch are treated as zero on next _settleGains call.
         This prevents pre-drain depositors from reclaiming burned gUSD from new depositors.
         GOO-361 fix.
@notice ilk -> cumulative collateral gain per unit of gUSD deposited (scaled by PRECISION)
@notice ilk -> collateral token address

@notice All registered ilk keys in order of registration.
         Used to iterate and reset gainSnapshots on epoch boundary re-deposits (GOO-367).

@notice epoch -> scaleIndex value recorded just before the drain reset.
         When drainEpoch increments, the scaleIndex is first saved here so that
         pre-drain depositors can be settled against the correct (pre-reset) scale
         rather than the post-reset PRECISION value (GOO-371 fix).
@notice ilk -> pending undistributed collateral (dust from rounding)

@notice Step 1 of a two-step admin transfer.
         The current admin proposes a new admin; ownership is NOT
         transferred until the new admin calls `acceptAdmin`.
         Pass the current admin's address (or any other) to overwrite a
         previous proposal — there is no separate cancel function.
         GOO-493.

@notice Deposit gUSD into the stability pool.
         Pending collateral gains for all registered ilks are settled first.
@notice Withdraw up to `amount` gUSD and claim all pending collateral gains.
@notice Claim earned collateral for a single ilk without withdrawing gUSD.

@notice Materialise the user's effective deposit balance by applying the
         global scaleIndex. This converts the stored nominal deposit
         (as of the user's last action) to the current proportional share,
         accounting for all offsets that occurred in between.
         After this call, `deposits[user]` reflects the actual gUSD the user
         is entitled to withdraw (their pro-rata share of remaining pool).
         The gainSnapshot is NOT updated here — per-ilk gain claims continue
         to use the raw deposit amount and must be claimed explicitly via
         claimCollateral(). GOO-352 fix.

@notice Liquity V1/V2 compatibility alias for deposit().
         Ignores the optional frontEndTag parameter (not used in GoodStable).
@notice Liquity V1 two-arg variant (frontEndTag ignored).
@notice Liquity variant with address[] hints (hints ignored).
@notice Liquity-compatible alias for withdraw().
@notice Preview pending collateral gain for a depositor on a given ilk.
